nodes.label: AI as documentation summarizer for efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: instead of spending 1-2 hours reading individual web pages, an LLM can do it in seconds and give me the answer

nodes.label: Understanding underlying systems for competence
nodes.label_negative: Using AI solutions without understanding (being a wizard)
nodes.grounding_span: I need to understand how my systems operate to act professionally with them

nodes.label: AI as iterative problem-solving partner
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable hallucinator requiring abandonment
nodes.grounding_span: I will keep a conversation going so that I keep all of the references under the same conversation name, but I still often have to abandon specific ideas or trains of thought

nodes.label: AI as another tool in the toolbox
nodes.label_negative: AI as a silver bullet or replacement
nodes.grounding_span: LLMs are another tool in the toolbox, so let's see what it can do with this idea or problem that I have

nodes.label: Organizational standardized AI adoption
nodes.grounding_span: I am not creating siloed AI implementations within my department, but rather working with the organization as a whole

nodes.label: AI as efficiency and relevance enhancer for career
nodes.label_negative: AI as threat to job roles
nodes.grounding_span: engineers who stay in touch with AI solutions will end up being more efficient and relevant in the workforce

nodes.label: Secure localized AI with organizational knowledge
nodes.label_negative: Insecure or generic AI without tailored access
nodes.grounding_span: secure RAG type solutions, where we can run local models that have access to all of our documentation and environment

nodes.label: Professional competence and understanding
nodes.grounding_span: I need to understand how my systems operate to act professionally with them

nodes.label: Efficiency and time savings
nodes.grounding_span: instead of spending 1-2 hours reading individual web pages, an LLM can do it in seconds

nodes.label: Problem-solving effectiveness
nodes.grounding_span: I don't know how long or if I ever would have found this on my own

nodes.label: Career relevance and adaptability
nodes.grounding_span: engineers who stay in touch with AI solutions will end up being more efficient and relevant in the workforce

nodes.label: Security and organizational integrity
nodes.grounding_span: without fear of exposing anything or compromising security

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as problem-solving aid
nodes.grounding_span: I had a particularly satisfying moment with a major LLM

nodes.label: Frustration with AI hallucination and abandonment
nodes.grounding_span: LLMs will often hallucinate commands or menu options that don't exist

nodes.label: Pragmatic acceptance of AI limitations
nodes.grounding_span: If it can't find anything, I still have to figure it out on my own, and that's okay

nodes.label: Optimism about future secure localized AI
nodes.grounding_span: One thing I would like to see more of is secure RAG type solutions

nodes.label: Two-step verification approach: understand before applying
nodes.grounding_span: I need to first ask the model how the system works, before asking for a solution

nodes.label: Iterative refinement with solo work breaks
nodes.grounding_span: I will work on it solo for a bit, then come back with a more refined prompt
